1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Tenant: id, name
7	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
8	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (nullable self-ref FK)
9	- Permission: id, code (e.g. doc.read, doc.write, doc.delete, doc.write.any, role.manage)
10	- role_permissions: many-to-many (role_id, permission_id)
11	- user_roles: many-to-many (user_id, role_id)
12	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK to User), title, content
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	# Many-to-many association tables
24	role_permissions = db.Table('role_permissions',
25	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True),
26	    db.Column('permission_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('permission.id'), primary_key=True)
27	)
28	
29	user_roles = db.Table('user_roles',
30	    db.Column('user_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), primary_key=True),
31	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True)
32	)
33	
34	
35	class Tenant(db.Model):
36	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
37	    name = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
38	    users = db.relationship('User', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
39	    roles = db.relationship('Role', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
40	    documents = db.relationship('Document', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
41	
42	
43	class User(db.Model):
44	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
45	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
46	    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
47	    password_hash = db.Column(db.String(256), nullable=False)
48	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
49	    roles = db.relationship('Role', secondary=user_roles, backref='users')
50	
51	
52	class Role(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
55	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), nullable=False)
56	    parent_role_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), nullable=True)
57	    permissions = db.relationship('Permission', secondary=role_permissions, backref='roles')
58	
59	
60	class Permission(db.Model):
61	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
62	    code = db.Column(db.String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
63	
64	
65	class Document(db.Model):
66	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
67	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
68	    owner_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
69	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
70	    content = db.Column(db.Text, default='')
71	    owner = db.relationship('User', backref='documents')
72

16	Token must contain user_id and tenant_id for proper RBAC enforcement.

1	# T2-3：RBAC 权限管理系统（多模块版本）
2	
3	## 项目结构
4	
5	```
6	starter/
7	  app.py              # Flask app 工厂 + DB 初始化（请勿修改）
8	  models.py           # 数据模型（Tenant, User, Role, Permission, Document + 关联表）
9	  middleware.py       # JWT 验证 + 权限检查（含继承遍历）
10	  routes_auth.py      # 登录接口 —— 需要完善
11	  routes_document.py  # 文档 CRUD + RBAC —— 需要实现
12	  routes_role.py      # 角色管理 + 用户角色分配 —— 需要实现
13	  requirements.txt    # 依赖
14	```
15	
16	## 重要提示
17	
18	这是一个**多模块项目**，代码分布在 6 个文件中。模块间有复杂依赖：
19	- `middleware.py` 需要从 `models.py` 导入 Role/Permission 进行继承遍历
20	- `routes_document.py` 需要使用 `middleware.py` 的权限检查
21	- `routes_role.py` 需要检查 `middleware.py` 的 role.manage 权限
22	- 所有路由需要从 `models.py` 导入对应模型
23	- `app.py` 负责组装所有模块（请勿修改）
24	
25	**请确保各模块之间的接口（权限码字符串、模型字段名、JWT payload 结构）保持一致。**
26	
27	## 功能要求
28	
29	### 1. 数据模型（models.py）
30	- Tenant: id, name
31	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
32	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (self-ref FK, nullable)
33	- Permission: id, code (e.g. `doc.read`, `doc.write`, `doc.delete`, `doc.write.any`, `role.manage`)
34	- role_permissions: 多对多关联表
35	- user_roles: 多对多关联表
36	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK), title, content
37	
38	### 2. 认证中间件（middleware.py）
39	- JWT 验证：从 `Authorization: Bearer <token>` 解析
40	- 缺失/无效/过期 token → 401
41	- 权限检查：沿 `parent_role_id` 继承链向上查找
42	- 提供装饰器和辅助函数
43	
44	### 3. 认证接口（routes_auth.py）
45	使用 `auth_bp = Blueprint('auth_bp', __name__)`
46	- `POST /login` — 登录，返回 JWT（含 user_id + tenant_id）
47	
48	### 4. 文档接口（routes_document.py）
49	使用 `document_bp = Blueprint('document_bp', __name__)`
50	- `GET /documents` — 需要 `doc.read`，只返回本 tenant
51	- `GET /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.read` + 同 tenant（否则 404）
52	- `POST /documents` — 需要 `doc.write`
53	- `PUT /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.write` +（owner 或 `doc.write.any`）
54	- `DELETE /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.delete`
55	
56	### 5. 角色管理接口（routes_role.py）
57	使用 `role_bp = Blueprint('role_bp', __name__)`
58	- `POST /roles` — 创建角色（需要 `role.manage`）
59	- `GET /roles` — 列出本 tenant 的角色
60	- `PUT /roles/<id>/permissions` — 替换权限集 + 更新 parent
61	- `POST /users/<id>/roles` — 分配角色
62	- `DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>` — 移除角色
63	- 创建/修改时检测继承链循环
64	
65	### 接口返回格式
66	
67	```json
68	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
69	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
70	```
71	
72	## 验收标准
73	
74	1. ✅ 所有上述 API 接口可正常调用
75	2. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中的所有测试用例通过
76	
77	## 测试
78	
79	```bash
80	cd starter && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && python -m pytest tests/ -v
81	```
82

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///rbac.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	    app.config['JWT_SECRET'] = os.environ.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
20	    app.config['JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS'] = int(os.environ.get('JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS', '24'))
21	
22	    db.init_app(app)
23	
24	    # Import and register models
25	    from models import Tenant, User, Role, Permission, Document
26	
27	    # Import and register route blueprints
28	    from routes_auth import auth_bp
29	    from routes_document import document_bp
30	    from routes_role import role_bp
31	    app.register_blueprint(auth_bp)
32	    app.register_blueprint(document_bp)
33	    app.register_blueprint(role_bp)
34	
35	    with app.app_context():
36	        db.create_all()
37	
38	    return app
39	
40	
41	if __name__ == '__main__':
42	    app = create_app()
43	    app.run(debug=True)

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Middleware
3	
4	JWT verification and permission checking with role inheritance.
5	"""
6	
7	import jwt as pyjwt
8	from flask import request, jsonify, g, current_app
9	from functools import wraps
10	from models import User, Role, Permission, role_permissions, user_roles
11	from app import db
12	
13	
14	def hash_password(password):
15	    """Simple password hash (for demo purposes)."""
16	    import hashlib
17	    return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()
18	
19	
20	def decode_token(token):
21	    """Decode and verify JWT token. Returns payload or None."""
22	    try:
23	        secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
24	        payload = pyjwt.decode(token, secret, algorithms=['HS256'])
25	        return payload
26	    except (pyjwt.ExpiredSignatureError, pyjwt.InvalidTokenError):
27	        return None
28	
29	
30	def get_current_user():
31	    """Extract current user from JWT in Authorization header.
32	    Returns (user_record, error_response) tuple.
33	    """
34	    auth_header = request.headers.get('Authorization', '')
35	    if not auth_header.startswith('Bearer '):
36	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing token'}), 401)
37	
38	    token = auth_header[7:]
39	    payload = decode_token(token)
40	    if payload is None:
41	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid or expired token'}), 401)
42	
43	    user = User.query.get(payload.get('user_id'))
44	    if user is None:
45	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'User not found'}), 401)
46	
47	    return user, None
48	
49	
50	def get_user_permissions(user):
51	    """Get all permissions for a user, including inherited ones from role hierarchy."""
52	    permissions = set()
53	    for role in user.roles:
54	        permissions.update(_collect_role_permissions(role))
55	    return permissions
56	
57	
58	def _collect_role_permissions(role, visited=None):
59	    """Recursively collect permissions from a role and its parent chain."""
60	    if visited is None:
61	        visited = set()
62	    if role.id in visited:
63	        return set()
64	    visited.add(role.id)
65	
66	    perms = set(p.code for p in role.permissions)
67	    if role.parent_role_id:
68	        parent = Role.query.get(role.parent_role_id)
69	        if parent:
70	            perms.update(_collect_role_permissions(parent, visited))
71	    return perms
72	
73	
74	def check_permission(permission_code):
75	    """Decorator to check if current user has a specific permission."""
76	    def decorator(f):
77	        @wraps(f)
78	        def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
79	            user, error = get_current_user()
80	            if error:
81	                return error
82	
83	            perms = get_user_permissions(user)
84	            if permission_code not in perms:
85	                return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Permission denied'}), 403
86	
87	            g.current_user = user
88	            g.current_permissions = perms
89	            return f(*args, **kwargs)
90	        return decorated_function
91	    return decorator
92	
93	
94	def require_auth(f):
95	    """Decorator to require authentication without specific permission."""
96	    @wraps(f)
97	    def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
98	        user, error = get_current_user()
99	        if error:
100	            return error
101	        g.current_user = user
102	        g.current_permissions = get_user_permissions(user)
103	        return f(*args, **kwargs)
104	    return decorated_function
105

"""
T2 RBAC System — Auth Routes

Login and token management.
Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'auth_bp'.

Requirements:
- POST /login -> User login, returns JWT token
  Request: {"username": str, "password": str}
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"token": str}}
  - JWT payload contains: user_id, tenant_id, exp
  - Password is verified using middleware.hash_password()
Errors: 400 if username or password missing, 401 if invalid credentials

IMPORTANT: The JWT token is used by all other routes via middleware.get_current_user().
Token must contain user_id and tenant_id for proper RBAC enforcement.
"""

import datetime
import jwt as pyjwt
from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify, current_app
from models import User
from middleware import hash_password

auth_bp = Blueprint('auth_bp', __name__)


@auth_bp.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
def login():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
    if not data or not data.get('username') or not data.get('password'):
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Username and password are required'}), 400

    username = data['username']
    password = data['password']

    user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
    if user is None or user.password_hash != hash_password(password):
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid credentials'}), 401

    secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
    expiry_hours = current_app.config.get('JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS', 24)
    payload = {
        'user_id': user.id,
        'tenant_id': user.tenant_id,
        'exp': datetime.datetime.utcnow() + datetime.timedelta(hours=expiry_hours),
    }
    token = pyjwt.encode(payload, secret, algorithm='HS256')

    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': {'token': token}})

with app.app_context():
    db.drop_all()
    db.create_all()
    db.session.add(Tenant(id=1, name='T1'))
    pw = hash_password('pw')
    db.session.add(User(id=1, tenant_id=1, username='alice', password_hash=pw))
    db.session.commit()

    c = app.test_client()

    # Test 1: Missing params -> 400
    r = c.post('/login', json={'username': 'alice'})
    assert r.status_code == 400, f'Expected 400, got {r.status_code}: {r.data}'
    print('PASS: Missing password -> 400')

    r = c.post('/login', json={'password': 'pw'})
    assert r.status_code == 400, f'Expected 400, got {r.status_code}: {r.data}'
    print('PASS: Missing username -> 400')

    # Test 2: Invalid credentials -> 401
    r = c.post('/login', json={'username': 'alice', 'password': 'wrong'})
    assert r.status_code == 401, f'Expected 401, got {r.status_code}: {r.data}'
    print('PASS: Wrong password -> 401')

    r = c.post('/login', json={'username': 'nonexistent', 'password': 'pw'})
    assert r.status_code == 401, f'Expected 401, got {r.status_code}: {r.data}'
    print('PASS: Unknown user -> 401')

    # Test 3: Successful login -> 200 + token

    payload = pyjwt.decode(token, 'test-secret', algorithms=['HS256'])
    assert payload['user_id'] == 1
    assert payload['tenant_id'] == 1
    assert 'exp' in payload
    print('PASS: Token contains user_id, tenant_id, exp')

    print()
    print('All login tests passed!')

ATU-001 实现已完成。以下是摘要：

## 修改的文件

**`/Users/harry/Workspaces/disclaude/workspace/mem-agent-pm/experiment/results/scrum_t2_rbac_5/workspace/starter/routes_auth.py`**

## 实现详情

在 `auth_bp` 蓝图上实现了 `POST /login` 端点，包含：

- **输入验证**：从 JSON 请求体中解析 `username` 和 `password`。如果缺失，返回带有 `{"status": "error", "message": "..."}` 的 `400`。
- **凭据验证**：通过 `User.query.filter_by(username=...)` 查找用户，并使用 `middleware.hash_password()` 比较密码哈希。如果用户不存在或密码不匹配，则返回 `401`。
- **JWT 生成**：使用 `pyjwt.encode()` 生成令牌，负载包含 `user_id`、`tenant_id` 和 `exp`。密钥和过期时间从 `current_app.config` (JWT_SECRET, JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS) 读取。
- **成功响应**：返回带有 `{"status": "ok", "data": {"token": "<jwt>"}}` 的 `200`。

## 验证

- 所有 6 个手动登录测试通过（缺少用户名、缺少密码、错误密码、未知用户、有效登录、有效令牌负载）。
- 测试夹具中的所有 5 个用户都能成功登录。
- `TestAuth` 类中的 3 个 pytest 失败是由于 `/documents` 路由 (ATU-002) 返回 404 所致，而不是因为登录问题。

file.content:
"""
T2 RBAC System — Auth Routes

Login and token management.
Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'auth_bp'.

Requirements:
- POST /login -> User login, returns JWT token
  Request: {"username": str, "password": str}
  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"token": str}}
  - JWT payload contains: user_id, tenant_id, exp
  - Password is verified using middleware.hash_password()
  Errors: 400 if username or password missing, 401 if invalid credentials

IMPORTANT: The JWT token is used by all other routes via middleware.get_current_user().
Token must contain user_id and tenant_id for proper RBAC enforcement.
"""

import datetime
import jwt as pyjwt
from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify, current_app
from models import User
from middleware import hash_password

auth_bp = Blueprint('auth_bp', __name__)


@auth_bp.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
def login():
    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
    if not data or not data.get('username') or not data.get('password'):
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Username and password are required'}), 400

    username = data['username']
    password = data['password']

    user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
    if user is None or user.password_hash != hash_password(password):
        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid credentials'}), 401

    secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
    expiry_hours = current_app.config.get('JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS', 24)
    payload = {
        'user_id': user.id,
        'tenant_id': user.tenant_id,
        'exp': datetime.datetime.utcnow() + datetime.timedelta(hours=expiry_hours),
    }
    token = pyjwt.encode(payload, secret, algorithm='HS256')

    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': {'token': token}})

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Auth Routes
3	
4	Login and token management.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'auth_bp'.
6	
7	Requirements:
8	- POST /login -> User login, returns JWT token
9	  Request: {"username": str, "password": str}
10	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"token": str}}
11	  - JWT payload contains: user_id, tenant_id, exp
12	  - Password is verified using middleware.hash_password()
13	  Errors: 400 if username or password missing, 401 if invalid credentials
14	
15	IMPORTANT: The JWT token is used by all other routes via middleware.get_current_user().
16	Token must contain user_id and tenant_id for proper RBAC enforcement.
17	"""
18	
19	import datetime
20	import jwt as pyjwt
21	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify, current_app
22	from models import User
23	from middleware import hash_password
24	
25	auth_bp = Blueprint('auth_bp', __name__)
26	
27	
28	@auth_bp.route('/login', methods=['POST'])
29	def login():
30	    data = request.get_json(silent=True)
31	    if not data or not data.get('username') or not data.get('password'):
32	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Username and password are required'}), 400
33	
34	    username = data['username']
35	    password = data['password']
36	
37	    user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
38	    if user is None or user.password_hash != hash_password(password):
39	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid credentials'}), 401
40	
41	    secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
42	    expiry_hours = current_app.config.get('JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS', 24)
43	    payload = {
44	        'user_id': user.id,
45	        'tenant_id': user.tenant_id,
46	        'exp': datetime.datetime.utcnow() + datetime.timedelta(hours=expiry_hours),
47	    }
48	    token = pyjwt.encode(payload, secret, algorithm='HS256')
49	
50	    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': {'token': token}})
51

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///rbac.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	    app.config['JWT_SECRET'] = os.environ.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
20	    app.config['JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS'] = int(os.environ.get('JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS', '24'))
21	
22	    db.init_app(app)
23	
24	    # Import and register models
25	    from models import Tenant, User, Role, Permission, Document
26	
27	    # Import and register route blueprints
28	    from routes_auth import auth_bp
29	    from routes_document import document_bp
30	    from routes_role import role_bp
31	    app.register_blueprint(auth_bp)
32	    app.register_blueprint(document_bp)
33	    app.register_blueprint(role_bp)
34	
35	    with app.app_context():
36	        db.create_all()
37	
38	    return app
39	
40	
41	if __name__ == '__main__':
42	    app = create_app()
43	    app.run(debug=True)

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Role Management Routes
3	
4	Role CRUD, user-role assignment, permission management.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'role_bp'.
6	All operations require role.manage permission.
7	
8	Requirements:
9	- POST /roles -> Create role
10	  Requires: role.manage
11	  Request: {"name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null, "permissions": [str, ...]}
12	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null,
13	            "permissions": [str, ...]}}
14	  - Must check for duplicate role names within same tenant
15	  - parent_role_id must belong to same tenant
16	  Errors: 400 if name missing or parent invalid, 409 if duplicate name
17	
18	- GET /roles -> List roles for current tenant
19	  Requires: role.manage
20	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
21	
22	- PUT /roles/<id>/permissions -> Update role permissions and/or parent
23	  Requires: role.manage
24	  Request: {"permissions": [str, ...], "parent_role_id": int|null}
25	  - Must detect inheritance cycles when setting parent_role_id
26	  Errors: 404 if role not found, 400 if cycle detected or parent invalid
27	
28	- POST /users/<id>/roles -> Assign role to user
29	  Requires: role.manage
30	  Request: {"role_id": int}
31	  - Both user and role must belong to same tenant
32	  Errors: 404 if user or role not found
33	
34	- DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id> -> Remove role from user
35	  Requires: role.manage
36	  - Idempotent — no error if role not assigned
37	  Errors: 404 if user not found
38	
39	IMPORTANT: Role inheritance is handled by middleware._collect_role_permissions().
40	Roles are tenant-scoped. This module works with middleware.py and routes_document.py.
41	"""
42	
43	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
44	
45	role_bp = Blueprint('role_bp', __name__)
46	
47	# TODO: Implement all role management routes
48

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Middleware
3	
4	JWT verification and permission checking with role inheritance.
5	"""
6	
7	import jwt as pyjwt
8	from flask import request, jsonify, g, current_app
9	from functools import wraps
10	from models import User, Role, Permission, role_permissions, user_roles
11	from app import db
12	
13	
14	def hash_password(password):
15	    """Simple password hash (for demo purposes)."""
16	    import hashlib
17	    return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()
18	
19	
20	def decode_token(token):
21	    """Decode and verify JWT token. Returns payload or None."""
22	    try:
23	        secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
24	        payload = pyjwt.decode(token, secret, algorithms=['HS256'])
25	        return payload
26	    except (pyjwt.ExpiredSignatureError, pyjwt.InvalidTokenError):
27	        return None
28	
29	
30	def get_current_user():
31	    """Extract current user from JWT in Authorization header.
32	    Returns (user_record, error_response) tuple.
33	    """
34	    auth_header = request.headers.get('Authorization', '')
35	    if not auth_header.startswith('Bearer '):
36	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing token'}), 401)
37	
38	    token = auth_header[7:]
39	    payload = decode_token(token)
40	    if payload is None:
41	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid or expired token'}), 401)
42	
43	    user = User.query.get(payload.get('user_id'))
44	    if user is None:
45	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'User not found'}), 401)
46	
47	    return user, None
48	
49	
50	def get_user_permissions(user):
51	    """Get all permissions for a user, including inherited ones from role hierarchy."""
52	    permissions = set()
53	    for role in user.roles:
54	        permissions.update(_collect_role_permissions(role))
55	    return permissions
56	
57	
58	def _collect_role_permissions(role, visited=None):
59	    """Recursively collect permissions from a role and its parent chain."""
60	    if visited is None:
61	        visited = set()
62	    if role.id in visited:
63	        return set()
64	    visited.add(role.id)
65	
66	    perms = set(p.code for p in role.permissions)
67	    if role.parent_role_id:
68	        parent = Role.query.get(role.parent_role_id)
69	        if parent:
70	            perms.update(_collect_role_permissions(parent, visited))
71	    return perms
72	
73	
74	def check_permission(permission_code):
75	    """Decorator to check if current user has a specific permission."""
76	    def decorator(f):
77	        @wraps(f)
78	        def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
79	            user, error = get_current_user()
80	            if error:
81	                return error
82	
83	            perms = get_user_permissions(user)
84	            if permission_code not in perms:
85	                return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Permission denied'}), 403
86	
87	            g.current_user = user
88	            g.current_permissions = perms
89	            return f(*args, **kwargs)
90	        return decorated_function
91	    return decorator
92	
93	
94	def require_auth(f):
95	    """Decorator to require authentication without specific permission."""
96	    @wraps(f)
97	    def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
98	        user, error = get_current_user()
99	        if error:
100	            return error
101	        g.current_user = user
102	        g.current_permissions = get_user_permissions(user)
103	        return f(*args, **kwargs)
104	    return decorated_function
105

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Document Routes
3	
4	Document CRUD with RBAC enforcement.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'document_bp'.
6	
7	Permission requirements:
8	- GET /documents → doc.read (own tenant only)
9	- GET /documents/<id> → doc.read + same tenant
10	- POST /documents → doc.write
11	- PUT /documents/<id> → doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any)
12	- DELETE /documents/<id> → doc.delete
13	
14	Requirements:
15	- GET /documents -> List documents for current user's tenant
16	  Requires: doc.read permission
17	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
18	            "title": str, "content": str}, ...]}
19	
20	- POST /documents -> Create document
21	  Requires: doc.write permission
22	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
24	            "title": str, "content": str}}
25	  - tenant_id from JWT, owner_id = current user
26	
27	- GET /documents/<id> -> Get single document
28	  Requires: doc.read + same tenant
29	  Response: same as above
30	  Errors: 404 if not found or different tenant
31	
32	- PUT /documents/<id> -> Update document
33	  Requires: doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any permission) + same tenant
34	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
35	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if not owner and no doc.write.any
36	
37	- DELETE /documents/<id> -> Delete document
38	  Requires: doc.delete permission + same tenant
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if no permission
40	
41	IMPORTANT: Uses middleware.get_current_user() for JWT auth and
42	middleware.get_user_permissions() for permission checking.
43	Documents are tenant-scoped — users can only see/edit their own tenant's docs.
44	"""
45	
46	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
47	
48	document_bp = Blueprint('document_bp', __name__)
49	
50	# TODO: Implement all document routes with RBAC enforcement
51

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Tenant: id, name
7	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
8	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (nullable self-ref FK)
9	- Permission: id, code (e.g. doc.read, doc.write, doc.delete, doc.write.any, role.manage)
10	- role_permissions: many-to-many (role_id, permission_id)
11	- user_roles: many-to-many (user_id, role_id)
12	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK to User), title, content
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	# Many-to-many association tables
24	role_permissions = db.Table('role_permissions',
25	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True),
26	    db.Column('permission_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('permission.id'), primary_key=True)
27	)
28	
29	user_roles = db.Table('user_roles',
30	    db.Column('user_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), primary_key=True),
31	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True)
32	)
33	
34	
35	class Tenant(db.Model):
36	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
37	    name = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
38	    users = db.relationship('User', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
39	    roles = db.relationship('Role', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
40	    documents = db.relationship('Document', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
41	
42	
43	class User(db.Model):
44	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
45	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
46	    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
47	    password_hash = db.Column(db.String(256), nullable=False)
48	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
49	    roles = db.relationship('Role', secondary=user_roles, backref='users')
50	
51	
52	class Role(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
55	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), nullable=False)
56	    parent_role_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), nullable=True)
57	    permissions = db.relationship('Permission', secondary=role_permissions, backref='roles')
58	
59	
60	class Permission(db.Model):
61	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
62	    code = db.Column(db.String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
63	
64	
65	class Document(db.Model):
66	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
67	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
68	    owner_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
69	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
70	    content = db.Column(db.Text, default='')
71	    owner = db.relationship('User', backref='documents')

Now I have a complete picture. Here is my test report.

---

## Tester Report -- Sprint 1, Round 1

### 1. ATU-001 (POST /login) Related Test Results

The ATU-001 implementation covers the login endpoint. However, the test suite has **no dedicated unit tests for POST /login alone**. Instead, login is exercised indirectly through the `_login()` helper used by nearly every other test fixture (e.g., `admin_token`, `noroles_token`, `tenant_b_admin_token`). The login helper itself asserts:

```python
def _login(client, username):
    resp = client.post('/login', json={'username': username, 'password': 'pw'})
    assert resp.status_code == 200, resp.get_data(as_text=True)
    return resp.json['data']['token']
```

**Login itself is working correctly.** The fixtures `admin_token`, `noroles_token`, and `tenant_b_admin_token` are all produced successfully (no assertion failures inside `_login()`). This confirms:
- POST /login returns 200 for valid credentials
- Response body matches `{"status": "ok", "data": {"token": "<jwt>"}}`
- JWT is generated and can be decoded

### 2. Full Test Summary

| Category | Total | Passed | Failed |
|----------|-------|--------|--------|
| TestAuth (middleware/auth) | 3 | 0 | 3 |
| TestRoleManagement | 4 | 0 | 4 |
| TestDocumentRBAC | 6 | 0 | 6 |
| TestMultiTenant | 3 | 0 | 3 |
| TestPermissionInheritance | 3 | 0 | 3 |
| **Total** | **19** | **0** | **19** |

### 3. Failure Analysis

All 19 failures share the same root cause: **routes_document.py and routes_role.py are unimplemented stubs.** They register their blueprints but contain no route handlers -- only `# TODO: Implement all ... routes` comments. This means every endpoint except `/login` returns 404.

#### Failure Pattern Breakdown

**Pattern A: 404 instead of expected status (12 tests)**
- `TestAuth::test_missing_token_returns_401` -- expects 401, got 404 (GET /documents route missing)
- `TestAuth::test_invalid_jwt_returns_401` -- expects 401, got 404
- `TestAuth::test_expired_jwt_returns_401` -- expects 401, got 404
- `TestRoleManagement::test_admin_can_create_role` -- expects 201, got 404 (POST /roles missing)
- `TestRoleManagement::test_non_admin_cannot_create_role` -- expects 403, got 404
- `TestRoleManagement::test_role_inheritance_works` -- expects 201, got 404
- `TestDocumentRBAC::test_no_read_permission_returns_403` -- expects 403, got 404
- Plus 5 more with the same pattern

**Pattern B: TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable (7 tests)**
- `TestRoleManagement::test_inheritance_cycle_rejected` -- `r_a.json['data']['id']` fails because `r_a.json` is `None` (404 response body)
- `TestDocumentRBAC::test_viewer_can_read`, `test_viewer_cannot_post`, `test_editor_can_edit_own`, `test_editor_cannot_edit_others`, `test_admin_has_write_any`
- `TestMultiTenant::test_cross_tenant_document_returns_404`, `test_cross_tenant_role_forbidden`, `test_list_documents_only_own_tenant`
- `TestPermissionInheritance::test_add_permission_propagates`, `test_remove_permission_revokes`, `test_multi_role_union`

All Pattern B failures are cascading: a prior API call (e.g., `_create_role()` or `client.post('/documents', ...)`) returns 404 with a JSON body that has no `data` key, causing `resp.json['data']` to be `None`, and subsequent `['id']` access raises TypeError.

### 4. Sprint Goal Alignment

The Sprint Goal is to complete all three RBAC modules (login, document CRUD, role management). Current status:

| Module | File | Status |
|--------|------|--------|
| Login (auth) | `routes_auth.py` | **Implemented** -- login works, JWT generation verified |
| Document CRUD | `routes_document.py` | **Not implemented** -- empty blueprint stub |
| Role Management | `routes_role.py` | **Not implemented** -- empty blueprint stub |
| Middleware | `middleware.py` | **Implemented** -- `get_current_user()`, `check_permission()`, `require_auth()`, `get_user_permissions()`, `_collect_role_permissions()` all present |

### 5. Recommended Next Steps

1. **Next ATU should target `routes_role.py`**: Implement POST /roles, GET /roles, PUT /roles/\<id\>/permissions, POST /users/\<id\>/roles, DELETE /users/\<id\>/roles/\<role_id\>. This will unblock most TestRoleManagement and TestPermissionInheritance tests.

2. **Following ATU should target `routes_document.py`**: Implement GET /documents, POST /documents, GET /documents/\<id\>, PUT /documents/\<id\>, DELETE /documents/\<id\>. This will unblock TestAuth (which tests middleware via /documents), TestDocumentRBAC, and TestMultiTenant.

3. **Non-blocking note**: The `datetime.datetime.utcnow()` deprecation warning appears in both `routes_auth.py:46` and `test_basic.py:116`. Consider switching to `datetime.datetime.now(datetime.UTC)` in a future cleanup pass.

content.text:
---

## 📊 Daily Standup — Sprint 1 Round 2

**Developer**: 🟢 ATU-001 已完成，POST /login 正常工作。接下来实现 ATU-002 文档 CRUD。
**Tester**: 🟡 ATU-001 登录验证通过。19 个测试失败均为 ATU-002/003 未实现导致。
**Reviewer**: 🟡 ATU-001 代码简洁清晰，无问题。关注 ATU-002 的 RBAC 权限检查逻辑。

---

## ⚙️ Sprint 1 Round 2 — 实现 ATU-002（文档 CRUD）

input.prompt:
你是 Scrum 团队的 Developer 子 Agent。当前处于 Sprint 1 Round 2。
Sprint Goal: 完成 RBAC 系统全部三个模块（登录、文档 CRUD、角色管理），使所有测试通过

**Scrum 开发原则**：
- 实现**最小可行增量**：只做完成当前 ATU 所需的最少工作，不要过度设计或提前实现未来 ATU 的功能
- 每个增量必须是可以独立运行和测试的
- 如果发现需求不明确，做最简单合理的假设，不要停下来等澄清
- 代码必须通过现有测试才能算完成

请阅读 README.md 了解项目需求。
请阅读 state.json 了解项目上下文和已完成的工作。

请实现以下 ATU：
- ATU ID: ATU-002
- 描述: 在 routes_document.py 中实现 5 个文档接口：GET /documents（doc.read，本 tenant）、GET /documents/<id>（doc.read + 同 tenant）、POST /documents（doc.write）、PUT /documents/<id>（doc.write + owner/doc.write.any）、DELETE /documents/<id>（doc.delete）。所有接口使用 middleware 的权限检查装饰器。
- 相关文件: starter/routes_document.py
- Sprint Goal 关联: 文档 CRUD 是 RBAC 系统的核心功能，测试覆盖文档权限、多租户隔离

**重要实现细节**（基于测试文件 tests/test_basic.py 分析）：

1. **GET /documents**:
   - 需要 `doc.read` 权限（使用 middleware.check_permission 装饰器）
   - 只返回当前用户 tenant 的文档
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

2. **GET /documents/<id>**:
   - 需要 `doc.read` 权限
   - 必须是同 tenant，否则返回 404（不是 403！测试期望 404）
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {...}}

3. **POST /documents**:
   - 需要 `doc.write` 权限
   - tenant_id 从当前用户获取（g.current_user.tenant_id）
   - owner_id = 当前用户 ID
   - 响应状态码: 201
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int, "title": str, "content": str}}

4. **PUT /documents/<id>**:
   - 需要 `doc.write` 权限
   - 必须是文档 owner 或者有 `doc.write.any` 权限
   - 不是 owner 且没有 doc.write.any → 返回 403
   - 同 tenant 检查（不同 tenant 返回 404）
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {...}}

5. **DELETE /documents/<id>**:
   - 需要 `doc.delete` 权限
   - 同 tenant 检查
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": null} 或类似

**middleware.py 提供的函数**：
- `check_permission(permission_code)` - 装饰器，检查权限并将 user 和 permissions 存入 g
- `require_auth` - 装饰器，只验证认证
- `get_current_user()` - 返回 (user, error_response)
- `get_user_permissions(user)` - 获取用户所有权限（含继承）

**models.py 提供的模型**：
- `Document`: id, tenant_id, owner_id, title, content, owner(relationship)

**注意**：
- 使用 `from middleware import check_permission` 导入装饰器

2. **GET /documents/<id>**:

   - 同 tenant 检查

content.content:
1	# T2-3：RBAC 权限管理系统（多模块版本）
2	
3	## 项目结构
4	
5	```
6	starter/
7	  app.py              # Flask app 工厂 + DB 初始化（请勿修改）
8	  models.py           # 数据模型（Tenant, User, Role, Permission, Document + 关联表）
9	  middleware.py       # JWT 验证 + 权限检查（含继承遍历）
10	  routes_auth.py      # 登录接口 —— 需要完善
11	  routes_document.py  # 文档 CRUD + RBAC —— 需要实现
12	  routes_role.py      # 角色管理 + 用户角色分配 —— 需要实现
13	  requirements.txt    # 依赖
14	```
15	
16	## 重要提示
17	
18	这是一个**多模块项目**，代码分布在 6 个文件中。模块间有复杂依赖：
19	- `middleware.py` 需要从 `models.py` 导入 Role/Permission 进行继承遍历
20	- `routes_document.py` 需要使用 `middleware.py` 的权限检查
21	- `routes_role.py` 需要检查 `middleware.py` 的 role.manage 权限
22	- 所有路由需要从 `models.py` 导入对应模型
23	- `app.py` 负责组装所有模块（请勿修改）
24	
25	**请确保各模块之间的接口（权限码字符串、模型字段名、JWT payload 结构）保持一致。**
26	
27	## 功能要求
28	
29	### 1. 数据模型（models.py）
30	- Tenant: id, name
31	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
32	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (self-ref FK, nullable)
33	- Permission: id, code (e.g. `doc.read`, `doc.write`, `doc.delete`, `doc.write.any`, `role.manage`)
34	- role_permissions: 多对多关联表
35	- user_roles: 多对多关联表
36	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK), title, content
37	
38	### 2. 认证中间件（middleware.py）
39	- JWT 验证：从 `Authorization: Bearer <token>` 解析
40	- 缺失/无效/过期 token → 401
41	- 权限检查：沿 `parent_role_id` 继承链向上查找
42	- 提供装饰器和辅助函数
43	
44	### 3. 认证接口（routes_auth.py）
45	使用 `auth_bp = Blueprint('auth_bp', __name__)`
46	- `POST /login` — 登录，返回 JWT（含 user_id + tenant_id）
47	
48	### 4. 文档接口（routes_document.py）
49	使用 `document_bp = Blueprint('document_bp', __name__)`
50	- `GET /documents` — 需要 `doc.read`，只返回本 tenant
51	- `GET /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.read` + 同 tenant（否则 404）
52	- `POST /documents` — 需要 `doc.write`
53	- `PUT /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.write` +（owner 或 `doc.write.any`）
54	- `DELETE /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.delete`
55	
56	### 5. 角色管理接口（routes_role.py）
57	使用 `role_bp = Blueprint('role_bp', __name__)`
58	- `POST /roles` — 创建角色（需要 `role.manage`）
59	- `GET /roles` — 列出本 tenant 的角色
60	- `PUT /roles/<id>/permissions` — 替换权限集 + 更新 parent
61	- `POST /users/<id>/roles` — 分配角色
62	- `DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>` — 移除角色
63	- 创建/修改时检测继承链循环
64	
65	### 接口返回格式
66	
67	```json
68	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
69	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
70	```
71	
72	## 验收标准
73	
74	1. ✅ 所有上述 API 接口可正常调用
75	2. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中的所有测试用例通过
76	
77	## 测试
78	
79	```bash
80	cd starter && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && python -m pytest tests/ -v
81	```
82

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Document Routes
3	
4	Document CRUD with RBAC enforcement.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'document_bp'.
6	
7	Permission requirements:
8	- GET /documents → doc.read (own tenant only)
9	- GET /documents/<id> → doc.read + same tenant
10	- POST /documents → doc.write
11	- PUT /documents/<id> → doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any)
12	- DELETE /documents/<id> → doc.delete
13	
14	Requirements:
15	- GET /documents -> List documents for current user's tenant
16	  Requires: doc.read permission
17	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
18	            "title": str, "content": str}, ...]}
19	
20	- POST /documents -> Create document
21	  Requires: doc.write permission
22	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
24	            "title": str, "content": str}}
25	  - tenant_id from JWT, owner_id = current user
26	
27	- GET /documents/<id> -> Get single document
28	  Requires: doc.read + same tenant
29	  Response: same as above
30	  Errors: 404 if not found or different tenant
31	
32	- PUT /documents/<id> -> Update document
33	  Requires: doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any permission) + same tenant
34	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
35	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if not owner and no doc.write.any
36	
37	- DELETE /documents/<id> -> Delete document
38	  Requires: doc.delete permission + same tenant
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if no permission
40	
41	IMPORTANT: Uses middleware.get_current_user() for JWT auth and
42	middleware.get_user_permissions() for permission checking.
43	Documents are tenant-scoped — users can only see/edit their own tenant's docs.
44	"""
45	
46	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
47	
48	document_bp = Blueprint('document_bp', __name__)
49	
50	# TODO: Implement all document routes with RBAC enforcement
51

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Middleware
3	
4	JWT verification and permission checking with role inheritance.
5	"""
6	
7	import jwt as pyjwt
8	from flask import request, jsonify, g, current_app
9	from functools import wraps
10	from models import User, Role, Permission, role_permissions, user_roles
11	from app import db
12	
13	
14	def hash_password(password):
15	    """Simple password hash (for demo purposes)."""
16	    import hashlib
17	    return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()
18	
19	
20	def decode_token(token):
21	    """Decode and verify JWT token. Returns payload or None."""
22	    try:
23	        secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
24	        payload = pyjwt.decode(token, secret, algorithms=['HS256'])
25	        return payload
26	    except (pyjwt.ExpiredSignatureError, pyjwt.InvalidTokenError):
27	        return None
28	
29	
30	def get_current_user():
31	    """Extract current user from JWT in Authorization header.
32	    Returns (user_record, error_response) tuple.
33	    """
34	    auth_header = request.headers.get('Authorization', '')
35	    if not auth_header.startswith('Bearer '):
36	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing token'}), 401)
37	
38	    token = auth_header[7:]
39	    payload = decode_token(token)
40	    if payload is None:
41	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid or expired token'}), 401)
42	
43	    user = User.query.get(payload.get('user_id'))
44	    if user is None:
45	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'User not found'}), 401)
46	
47	    return user, None
48	
49	
50	def get_user_permissions(user):
51	    """Get all permissions for a user, including inherited ones from role hierarchy."""
52	    permissions = set()
53	    for role in user.roles:
54	        permissions.update(_collect_role_permissions(role))
55	    return permissions
56	
57	
58	def _collect_role_permissions(role, visited=None):
59	    """Recursively collect permissions from a role and its parent chain."""
60	    if visited is None:
61	        visited = set()
62	    if role.id in visited:
63	        return set()
64	    visited.add(role.id)
65	
66	    perms = set(p.code for p in role.permissions)
67	    if role.parent_role_id:
68	        parent = Role.query.get(role.parent_role_id)
69	        if parent:
70	            perms.update(_collect_role_permissions(parent, visited))
71	    return perms
72	
73	
74	def check_permission(permission_code):
75	    """Decorator to check if current user has a specific permission."""
76	    def decorator(f):
77	        @wraps(f)
78	        def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
79	            user, error = get_current_user()
80	            if error:
81	                return error
82	
83	            perms = get_user_permissions(user)
84	            if permission_code not in perms:
85	                return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Permission denied'}), 403
86	
87	            g.current_user = user
88	            g.current_permissions = perms
89	            return f(*args, **kwargs)
90	        return decorated_function
91	    return decorator
92	
93	
94	def require_auth(f):
95	    """Decorator to require authentication without specific permission."""
96	    @wraps(f)
97	    def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
98	        user, error = get_current_user()
99	        if error:
100	            return error
101	        g.current_user = user
102	        g.current_permissions = get_user_permissions(user)
103	        return f(*args, **kwargs)
104	    return decorated_function
105

1	"""
2	T2-3 RBAC 权限管理系统测试（多模块版本）
3

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Tenant: id, name
7	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
8	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (nullable self-ref FK)
9	- Permission: id, code (e.g. doc.read, doc.write, doc.delete, doc.write.any, role.manage)
10	- role_permissions: many-to-many (role_id, permission_id)
11	- user_roles: many-to-many (user_id, role_id)
12	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK to User), title, content
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	# Many-to-many association tables
24	role_permissions = db.Table('role_permissions',
25	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True),
26	    db.Column('permission_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('permission.id'), primary_key=True)
27	)
28	
29	user_roles = db.Table('user_roles',
30	    db.Column('user_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), primary_key=True),
31	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True)
32	)
33	
34	
35	class Tenant(db.Model):
36	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
37	    name = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
38	    users = db.relationship('User', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
39	    roles = db.relationship('Role', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
40	    documents = db.relationship('Document', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
41	
42	
43	class User(db.Model):
44	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
45	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
46	    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
47	    password_hash = db.Column(db.String(256), nullable=False)
48	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
49	    roles = db.relationship('Role', secondary=user_roles, backref='users')
50	
51	
52	class Role(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
55	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), nullable=False)
56	    parent_role_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), nullable=True)
57	    permissions = db.relationship('Permission', secondary=role_permissions, backref='roles')
58	
59	
60	class Permission(db.Model):
61	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
62	    code = db.Column(db.String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
63	
64	
65	class Document(db.Model):
66	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
67	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
68	    owner_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
69	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
70	    content = db.Column(db.Text, default='')
71	    owner = db.relationship('User', backref='documents')
72

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Flask App Factory & DB Initialization
3	
4	This file sets up the Flask app and database. DO NOT MODIFY this file.
5	All business logic goes in the other modules.
6	"""
7	
8	from flask import Flask
9	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
10	import os
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy()
13	
14	
15	def create_app():
16	    app = Flask(__name__)
17	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///rbac.db'
18	    app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
19	    app.config['JWT_SECRET'] = os.environ.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
20	    app.config['JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS'] = int(os.environ.get('JWT_EXPIRY_HOURS', '24'))
21	
22	    db.init_app(app)
23	
24	    # Import and register models
25	    from models import Tenant, User, Role, Permission, Document
26	
27	    # Import and register route blueprints
28	    from routes_auth import auth_bp
29	    from routes_document import document_bp
30	    from routes_role import role_bp
31	    app.register_blueprint(auth_bp)
32	    app.register_blueprint(document_bp)
33	    app.register_blueprint(role_bp)
34	
35	    with app.app_context():
36	        db.create_all()
37	
38	    return app
39	
40	
41	if __name__ == '__main__':
42	    app = create_app()
43	    app.run(debug=True)

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Document Routes
3	
4	Document CRUD with RBAC enforcement.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'document_bp'.
6	
7	Permission requirements:
8	- GET /documents → doc.read (own tenant only)
9	- GET /documents/<id> → doc.read + same tenant
10	- POST /documents → doc.write
11	- PUT /documents/<id> → doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any)
12	- DELETE /documents/<id> → doc.delete
13	
14	Requirements:
15	- GET /documents -> List documents for current user's tenant
16	  Requires: doc.read permission
17	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [{"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
18	            "title": str, "content": str}, ...]}
19	
20	- POST /documents -> Create document
21	  Requires: doc.write permission
22	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
24	            "title": str, "content": str}}
25	  - tenant_id from JWT, owner_id = current user
26	
27	- GET /documents/<id> -> Get single document
28	  Requires: doc.read + same tenant
29	  Response: same as above
30	  Errors: 404 if not found or different tenant
31	
32	- PUT /documents/<id> -> Update document
33	  Requires: doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any permission) + same tenant
34	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
35	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if not owner and no doc.write.any
36	
37	- DELETE /documents/<id> -> Delete document
38	  Requires: doc.delete permission + same tenant
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if no permission
40	
41	IMPORTANT: Uses middleware.get_current_user() for JWT auth and
42	middleware.get_user_permissions() for permission checking.
43	Documents are tenant-scoped — users can only see/edit their own tenant's docs.
44	"""
45	
46	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify, g
47	from middleware import check_permission
48	from models import Document
49	from app import db
50	
51	document_bp = Blueprint('document_bp', __name__)
52	
53	
54	def _doc_to_dict(doc):
55	    return {
56	        'id': doc.id,
57	        'tenant_id': doc.tenant_id,
58	        'owner_id': doc.owner_id,
59	        'title': doc.title,
60	        'content': doc.content,
61	    }
62	
63	
64	@document_bp.route('/documents', methods=['GET'])
65	@check_permission('doc.read')
66	def list_documents():
67	    docs = Document.query.filter_by(tenant_id=g.current_user.tenant_id).all()
68	    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': [_doc_to_dict(d) for d in docs]}), 200
69	
70	
71	@document_bp.route('/documents', methods=['POST'])
72	@check_permission('doc.write')
73	def create_document():
74	    data = request.get_json()
75	    doc = Document(
76	        tenant_id=g.current_user.tenant_id,
77	        owner_id=g.current_user.id,
78	        title=data.get('title', ''),
79	        content=data.get('content', ''),
80	    )
81	    db.session.add(doc)
82	    db.session.commit()
83	    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': _doc_to_dict(doc)}), 201
84	
85	
86	@document_bp.route('/documents/<int:doc_id>', methods=['GET'])
87	@check_permission('doc.read')
88	def get_document(doc_id):
89	    doc = Document.query.get(doc_id)
90	    if doc is None or doc.tenant_id != g.current_user.tenant_id:
91	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Document not found'}), 404
92	    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': _doc_to_dict(doc)}), 200
93	
94	
95	@document_bp.route('/documents/<int:doc_id>', methods=['PUT'])
96	@check_permission('doc.write')
97	def update_document(doc_id):
98	    doc = Document.query.get(doc_id)
99	    if doc is None or doc.tenant_id != g.current_user.tenant_id:
100	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Document not found'}), 404
101	    if doc.owner_id != g.current_user.id and 'doc.write.any' not in g.current_permissions:
102	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Permission denied'}), 403
103	    data = request.get_json()
104	    if 'title' in data:
105	        doc.title = data['title']
106	    if 'content' in data:
107	        doc.content = data['content']
108	    db.session.commit()
109	    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': _doc_to_dict(doc)}), 200
110	
111	
112	@document_bp.route('/documents/<int:doc_id>', methods=['DELETE'])
113	@check_permission('doc.delete')
114	def delete_document(doc_id):
115	    doc = Document.query.get(doc_id)
116	    if doc is None or doc.tenant_id != g.current_user.tenant_id:
117	        return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Document not found'}), 404
118	    db.session.delete(doc)
119	    db.session.commit()
120	    return jsonify({'status': 'ok', 'data': None}), 200

|----------|--------|-----------|-------------|
| `/documents` | GET | `doc.read` | Lists only current tenant's documents |

| `/documents/<id>` | GET | `doc.read` | Returns 404 if not found or different tenant |
| `/documents/<id>` | PUT | `doc.write` | Returns 404 if different tenant; returns 403 if not owner and no `doc.write.any` |
| `/documents/<id>` | DELETE | `doc.delete` | Returns 404 if not found or different tenant |

### Test Results

- **6 passed** (all tests directly exercising document routes):
  - `test_missing_token_returns_401` -- auth middleware works on document routes
  - `test_invalid_jwt_returns_401` -- invalid JWT rejected
  - `test_expired_jwt_returns_401` -- expired JWT rejected
  - `test_no_read_permission_returns_403` -- user without `doc.read` gets 403
  - `test_cross_tenant_document_returns_404` -- cross-tenant access returns 404

你是 Scrum 团队的 Developer 子 Agent。当前处于 Sprint 1 Round 2。
Sprint Goal: 完成 RBAC 系统全部三个模块（登录、文档 CRUD、角色管理），使所有测试通过

**Scrum 开发原则**：
- 实现**最小可行增量**：只做完成当前 ATU 所需的最少工作，不要过度设计或提前实现未来 ATU 的功能
- 每个增量必须是可以独立运行和测试的
- 如果发现需求不明确，做最简单合理的假设，不要停下来等澄清
- 代码必须通过现有测试才能算完成

请阅读 README.md 了解项目需求。
请阅读 state.json 了解项目上下文和已完成的工作。

请实现以下 ATU：
- ATU ID: ATU-002
- 描述: 在 routes_document.py 中实现 5 个文档接口：GET /documents（doc.read，本 tenant）、GET /documents/<id>（doc.read + 同 tenant）、POST /documents（doc.write）、PUT /documents/<id>（doc.write + owner/doc.write.any）、DELETE /documents/<id>（doc.delete）。所有接口使用 middleware 的权限检查装饰器。
- 相关文件: starter/routes_document.py
- Sprint Goal 关联: 文档 CRUD 是 RBAC 系统的核心功能，测试覆盖文档权限、多租户隔离

**重要实现细节**（基于测试文件 tests/test_basic.py 分析）：

1. **GET /documents**:
   - 需要 `doc.read` 权限（使用 middleware.check_permission 装饰器）
   - 只返回当前用户 tenant 的文档
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

2. **GET /documents/<id>**:
   - 需要 `doc.read` 权限
   - 必须是同 tenant，否则返回 404（不是 403！测试期望 404）
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {...}}

3. **POST /documents**:
   - 需要 `doc.write` 权限
   - tenant_id 从当前用户获取（g.current_user.tenant_id）
   - owner_id = 当前用户 ID
   - 响应状态码: 201
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int, "title": str, "content": str}}

4. **PUT /documents/<id>**:
   - 需要 `doc.write` 权限
   - 必须是文档 owner 或者有 `doc.write.any` 权限
   - 不是 owner 且没有 doc.write.any → 返回 403
   - 同 tenant 检查（不同 tenant 返回 404）
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {...}}

5. **DELETE /documents/<id>**:
   - 需要 `doc.delete` 权限
   - 同 tenant 检查
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": null} 或类似

**middleware.py 提供的函数**：
- `check_permission(permission_code)` - 装饰器，检查权限并将 user 和 permissions 存入 g
- `require_auth` - 装饰器，只验证认证
- `get_current_user()` - 返回 (user, error_response)
- `get_user_permissions(user)` - 获取用户所有权限（含继承）

**models.py 提供的模型**：
- `Document`: id, tenant_id, owner_id, title, content, owner(relationship)

**注意**：
- 使用 `from middleware import check_permission` 导入装饰器
- 使用 `from models import Document` 导入模型
- 使用 `from app import db` 导入数据库
- 使用 `from flask import g` 访问当前用户 (g.current_user)
- 对于 PUT 接口，需要额外检查 `doc.write.any` 在 g.current_permissions 中

完成后报告修改了哪些文件。

4	Document CRUD with RBAC enforcement.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'document_bp'.
6	
7	Permission requirements:
8	- GET /documents → doc.read (own tenant only)
9	- GET /documents/<id> → doc.read + same tenant
10	- POST /documents → doc.write
11	- PUT /documents/<id> → doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any)
12	- DELETE /documents/<id> → doc.delete
13	
14	Requirements:
15	- GET /documents -> List documents for current user's tenant
16	  Requires: doc.read permission

18	            "title": str, "content": str}, ...]}
19	
20	- POST /documents -> Create document
21	  Requires: doc.write permission

23	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "tenant_id": int, "owner_id": int,
24	            "title": str, "content": str}}
25	  - tenant_id from JWT, owner_id = current user
26	
27	- GET /documents/<id> -> Get single document
28	  Requires: doc.read + same tenant
29	  Response: same as above
30	  Errors: 404 if not found or different tenant
31	
32	- PUT /documents/<id> -> Update document
33	  Requires: doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any permission) + same tenant
34	  Request: {"title": str, "content": str}
35	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if not owner and no doc.write.any
36	
37	- DELETE /documents/<id> -> Delete document
38	  Requires: doc.delete permission + same tenant
39	  Errors: 404 if not found, 403 if no permission
40	
41	IMPORTANT: Uses middleware.get_current_user() for JWT auth and
42	middleware.get_user_permissions() for permission checking.
43	Documents are tenant-scoped — users can only see/edit their own tenant's docs.
44	"""

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Middleware
3	
4	JWT verification and permission checking with role inheritance.
5	"""
6	
7	import jwt as pyjwt
8	from flask import request, jsonify, g, current_app
9	from functools import wraps
10	from models import User, Role, Permission, role_permissions, user_roles
11	from app import db
12	
13	
14	def hash_password(password):
15	    """Simple password hash (for demo purposes)."""
16	    import hashlib
17	    return hashlib.sha256(password.encode()).hexdigest()
18	
19	
20	def decode_token(token):
21	    """Decode and verify JWT token. Returns payload or None."""
22	    try:
23	        secret = current_app.config.get('JWT_SECRET', 'dev-secret-key')
24	        payload = pyjwt.decode(token, secret, algorithms=['HS256'])
25	        return payload
26	    except (pyjwt.ExpiredSignatureError, pyjwt.InvalidTokenError):
27	        return None
28	
29	
30	def get_current_user():
31	    """Extract current user from JWT in Authorization header.
32	    Returns (user_record, error_response) tuple.
33	    """
34	    auth_header = request.headers.get('Authorization', '')
35	    if not auth_header.startswith('Bearer '):
36	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Missing token'}), 401)
37	
38	    token = auth_header[7:]
39	    payload = decode_token(token)
40	    if payload is None:
41	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Invalid or expired token'}), 401)
42	
43	    user = User.query.get(payload.get('user_id'))
44	    if user is None:
45	        return None, (jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'User not found'}), 401)
46	
47	    return user, None
48	
49	
50	def get_user_permissions(user):
51	    """Get all permissions for a user, including inherited ones from role hierarchy."""
52	    permissions = set()
53	    for role in user.roles:
54	        permissions.update(_collect_role_permissions(role))
55	    return permissions
56	
57	
58	def _collect_role_permissions(role, visited=None):
59	    """Recursively collect permissions from a role and its parent chain."""
60	    if visited is None:
61	        visited = set()
62	    if role.id in visited:
63	        return set()
64	    visited.add(role.id)
65	
66	    perms = set(p.code for p in role.permissions)
67	    if role.parent_role_id:
68	        parent = Role.query.get(role.parent_role_id)
69	        if parent:
70	            perms.update(_collect_role_permissions(parent, visited))
71	    return perms
72	
73	
74	def check_permission(permission_code):
75	    """Decorator to check if current user has a specific permission."""
76	    def decorator(f):
77	        @wraps(f)
78	        def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
79	            user, error = get_current_user()
80	            if error:
81	                return error
82	
83	            perms = get_user_permissions(user)
84	            if permission_code not in perms:
85	                return jsonify({'status': 'error', 'message': 'Permission denied'}), 403
86	
87	            g.current_user = user
88	            g.current_permissions = perms
89	            return f(*args, **kwargs)
90	        return decorated_function
91	    return decorator
92	
93	
94	def require_auth(f):
95	    """Decorator to require authentication without specific permission."""
96	    @wraps(f)
97	    def decorated_function(*args, **kwargs):
98	        user, error = get_current_user()
99	        if error:
100	            return error
101	        g.current_user = user
102	        g.current_permissions = get_user_permissions(user)
103	        return f(*args, **kwargs)
104	    return decorated_function
105

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Data Models
3	
4	Define SQLAlchemy models here.
5	Requirements:
6	- Tenant: id, name
7	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
8	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (nullable self-ref FK)
9	- Permission: id, code (e.g. doc.read, doc.write, doc.delete, doc.write.any, role.manage)
10	- role_permissions: many-to-many (role_id, permission_id)
11	- user_roles: many-to-many (user_id, role_id)
12	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK to User), title, content
13	"""
14	
15	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
16	from datetime import datetime
17	import sys
18	import os
19	sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))
20	
21	from app import db
22	
23	# Many-to-many association tables
24	role_permissions = db.Table('role_permissions',
25	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True),
26	    db.Column('permission_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('permission.id'), primary_key=True)
27	)
28	
29	user_roles = db.Table('user_roles',
30	    db.Column('user_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), primary_key=True),
31	    db.Column('role_id', db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), primary_key=True)
32	)
33	
34	
35	class Tenant(db.Model):
36	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
37	    name = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
38	    users = db.relationship('User', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
39	    roles = db.relationship('Role', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
40	    documents = db.relationship('Document', backref='tenant', lazy=True)
41	
42	
43	class User(db.Model):
44	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
45	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
46	    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
47	    password_hash = db.Column(db.String(256), nullable=False)
48	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
49	    roles = db.relationship('Role', secondary=user_roles, backref='users')
50	
51	
52	class Role(db.Model):
53	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
54	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
55	    name = db.Column(db.String(80), nullable=False)
56	    parent_role_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('role.id'), nullable=True)
57	    permissions = db.relationship('Permission', secondary=role_permissions, backref='roles')
58	
59	
60	class Permission(db.Model):
61	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
62	    code = db.Column(db.String(100), unique=True, nullable=False)
63	
64	
65	class Document(db.Model):
66	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
67	    tenant_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('tenant.id'), nullable=False)
68	    owner_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
69	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
70	    content = db.Column(db.Text, default='')
71	    owner = db.relationship('User', backref='documents')
72

现在我已全面了解了实现细节。以下是我的审查结果。

---

## ATU-002 审查报告

### 审查范围
- 文件: `starter/routes_document.py` (121 行)
- 关联文件: `starter/middleware.py`, `starter/models.py`

### 功能正确性审查

逐项核对需求规格:

| 接口 | 需求 | 实现 | 结论 |
|------|------|------|------|
| GET /documents | doc.read, 仅本租户 | `@check_permission('doc.read')` + `filter_by(tenant_id=...)` | 正确 |
| POST /documents | doc.write, tenant_id 从 JWT, owner_id = 当前用户, 返回 201 | `@check_permission('doc.write')` + `g.current_user.tenant_id` + `g.current_user.id` + 返回 201 | 正确 |
| GET /documents/\<id\> | doc.read, 同租户否则 404 | `@check_permission('doc.read')` + tenant_id 校验, 不匹配返回 404 | 正确 |
| PUT /documents/\<id\> | doc.write + (owner OR doc.write.any), 不同租户 404, 非owner无write.any返回403 | 三层检查完整: 404(不存在/跨租户) -> 403(非owner且无doc.write.any) -> 更新 | 正确 |
| DELETE /documents/\<id\> | doc.delete, 同租户 | `@check_permission('doc.delete')` + tenant_id 校验 | 正确 |

### 与 middleware 的集成审查

- `check_permission` 装饰器在认证失败时返回 401, 权限不足返回 403, 通过后设置 `g.current_user` 和 `g.current_permissions`。
- routes_document.py 中所有路由都通过 `g.current_user` 访问用户信息, 通过 `g.current_permissions` 访问权限列表 (仅 PUT 路由使用了 `g.current_permissions`), 与 middleware 的设计完全一致。

### 代码质量观察 (不阻塞)

1. **`_doc_to_dict` 辅助函数** (第 54-61 行): 提取了文档到字典的转换逻辑, 5 个接口复用, 消除了重复代码。好的做法。

2. **POST /documents 的 `data.get` 默认值** (第 78-79 行): `title` 和 `content` 使用空字符串默认值, 而 Document 模型的 `title` 字段是 `nullable=False`, `content` 默认为空字符串。这意味着可以创建 title 为空字符串的文档。这是否符合业务需求取决于后续确认, 但不构成 bug。

3. **PUT /documents 的部分更新** (第 104-107 行): 支持只更新 title 或只更新 content, 是合理的 PATCH 语义 (虽然 HTTP method 是 PUT)。不阻塞, 但记录为风格差异。

4. **DELETE /documents 的返回体** (第 120 行): 返回 `{'status': 'ok', 'data': None}`, data 为 None 而非空对象。各接口风格基本统一, 可以接受。

### 测试覆盖审查

Tester 报告中 ATU-002 相关的 6 个测试全部通过:
- 认证相关 (3 个): 缺失 token、无效 JWT、过期 JWT 均返回 401 -- 由 middleware 处理, 正确。
- 权限相关 (1 个): 无 doc.read 权限返回 403 -- 由 `@check_permission` 装饰器处理, 正确。
- 租户隔离 (2 个): 跨租户文档返回 404、列表只返回本租户文档 -- 由 tenant_id 过滤处理, 正确。

13 个失败测试全部与 ATU-003 (routes_role.py) 相关, 与本次审查无关。

---

## 审查结论: 审查通过

**理由**:
1. 5 个文档接口的实现与需求规格完全一致, 包括权限检查、租户隔离、owner 校验、HTTP 状态码等。
2. 与 middleware 的集成正确, 通过 `g.current_user` 和 `g.current_permissions` 访问认证/权限信息。
3. ATU-002 相关的 6 个测试全部通过, 认证、授权、租户隔离三大安全维度均有覆盖。
4. 代码结构清晰, 无重复逻辑, 辅助函数复用良好。
5. 不存在破坏已有功能的风险 (新增文件, 不修改已有代码)。

---

## 📊 Daily Standup — Sprint 1 Round 3

**Developer**: 🟢 ATU-001 ✅ ATU-002 ✅ 已完成。接下来实现最后一个模块 ATU-003 角色管理。
**Tester**: 🟡 6 个测试已通过（认证 + 文档基础），13 个测试等待 ATU-003 解锁。
**Reviewer**: 🟡 ATU-001、ATU-002 审查均通过。ATU-003 的循环检测逻辑是关注重点。

---

## ⚙️ Sprint 1 Round 3 — 实现 ATU-003（角色管理）

input.prompt:
你是 Scrum 团队的 Developer 子 Agent。当前处于 Sprint 1 Round 3。
Sprint Goal: 完成 RBAC 系统全部三个模块（登录、文档 CRUD、角色管理），使所有测试通过

**Scrum 开发原则**：
- 实现**最小可行增量**：只做完成当前 ATU 所需的最少工作，不要过度设计或提前实现未来 ATU 的功能
- 每个增量必须是可以独立运行和测试的
- 如果发现需求不明确，做最简单合理的假设，不要停下来等澄清
- 代码必须通过现有测试才能算完成

请阅读 README.md 了解项目需求。
请阅读 state.json 了解项目上下文和已完成的工作。

请实现以下 ATU：
- ATU ID: ATU-003
- 描述: 在 routes_role.py 中实现 5 个角色管理接口：POST /roles（创建角色，role.manage）、GET /roles（列出本 tenant 角色）、PUT /roles/<id>/permissions（替换权限集 + 更新 parent）、POST /users/<id>/roles（分配角色）、DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>（移除角色）。需要检测继承链循环，角色和用户必须属于同 tenant。
- 相关文件: starter/routes_role.py
- Sprint Goal 关联: 角色管理是 RBAC 系统的关键功能，测试覆盖角色创建、继承、循环检测、权限分配

**重要实现细节**（基于测试文件 tests/test_basic.py 分析）：

1. **POST /roles**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 请求体: {"name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null, "permissions": [str, ...]}
   - 响应状态码: **201**
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null, "permissions": [str, ...]}}
   - permissions 数组中的每个 code 需要查找或创建对应的 Permission 记录
   - 如果提供了 parent_role_id，必须验证该角色属于当前 tenant

2. **GET /roles**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 返回当前 tenant 的所有角色
   - 每个角色需要包含 permissions 数组（权限 code 列表）
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

3. **PUT /roles/<id>/permissions**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 请求体: {"permissions": [str, ...], "parent_role_id": int|null}
   - **替换**权限集（不是追加），需要清除旧权限再设置新权限
   - 如果设置了 parent_role_id，需要检测继承链循环
   - 循环检测：如果新 parent 的继承链中包含当前角色自身（role.id），则返回 400
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {...}}

4. **POST /users/<id>/roles**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 请求体: {"role_id": int}
   - 用户和角色必须属于同 tenant（否则返回 403 或 404）
   - 测试 `test_cross_tenant_role_forbidden` 期望状态码为 403 或 404

5. **DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 幂等操作：如果角色未分配给用户，不返回错误
   - 如果用户不存在返回 404

**models.py 提供的模型和关联表**：
- `Role`: id, tenant_id, name, parent_role_id, permissions(relationship), users(relationship via backref)
- `Permission`: id, code
- `User`: id, tenant_id, roles(relationship)
- `role_permissions`: 关联表 (role_id, permission_id)
- `user_roles`: 关联表 (user_id, role_id)

**middleware.py 提供的函数**：
- `check_permission(permission_code)` - 装饰器
- `_collect_role_permissions(role, visited=None)` - 递归收集权限（可用于循环检测）

**循环检测算法**：
```python
def _would_create_cycle(role_id, new_parent_id):
    """检查将 role_id 的 parent 设为 new_parent_id 是否会创建循环"""
    visited = set()
    current = new_parent_id
    while current is not None:
        if current == role_id:
            return True  # 会形成循环
        if current in visited:
            return False  # 已访问过，不会形成循环
        visited.add(current)
        parent = Role.query.get(current)
        if parent is None:
            break
        current = parent.parent_role_id
    return False
```

**关键注意点**：
- 使用 `from middleware import check_permission` 导入装饰器
- 使用 `from models import Role, Permission, User, role_permissions, user_roles` 导入模型
- 使用 `from app import db` 导入数据库
- 对于 user_roles 关联表的操作，使用 `db.session.execute(user_roles.insert().values(...))` 和 `db.session.execute(user_roles.delete().where(...))`
- 对于 role_permissions 关联表的操作，使用类似方式
- 更新角色权限时，先清除旧权限：`db.session.execute(role_permissions.delete().where(role_permissions.c.role_id == role.id))`，再添加新权限
- Permission 记录如果不存在需要创建：`Permission.query.filter_by(code=code).first() or Permission(code=code)`

完成后报告修改了哪些文件。

- 描述: 在 routes_role.py 中实现 5 个角色管理接口：POST /roles（创建角色，role.manage）、GET /roles（列出本 tenant 角色）、PUT /roles/<id>/permissions（替换权限集 + 更新 parent）、POST /users/<id>/roles（分配角色）、DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>（移除角色）。需要检测继承链循环，角色和用户必须属于同 tenant。
- 相关文件: starter/routes_role.py
- Sprint Goal 关联: 角色管理是 RBAC 系统的关键功能，测试覆盖角色创建、继承、循环检测、权限分配

**重要实现细节**（基于测试文件 tests/test_basic.py 分析）：

1. **POST /roles**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 请求体: {"name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null, "permissions": [str, ...]}
   - 响应状态码: **201**
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null, "permissions": [str, ...]}}
   - permissions 数组中的每个 code 需要查找或创建对应的 Permission 记录
   - 如果提供了 parent_role_id，必须验证该角色属于当前 tenant

2. **GET /roles**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 返回当前 tenant 的所有角色
   - 每个角色需要包含 permissions 数组（权限 code 列表）
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}

3. **PUT /roles/<id>/permissions**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 请求体: {"permissions": [str, ...], "parent_role_id": int|null}
   - **替换**权限集（不是追加），需要清除旧权限再设置新权限
   - 如果设置了 parent_role_id，需要检测继承链循环
   - 循环检测：如果新 parent 的继承链中包含当前角色自身（role.id），则返回 400
   - 响应: {"status": "ok", "data": {...}}

4. **POST /users/<id>/roles**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 请求体: {"role_id": int}
   - 用户和角色必须属于同 tenant（否则返回 403 或 404）
   - 测试 `test_cross_tenant_role_forbidden` 期望状态码为 403 或 404

5. **DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>**:
   - 需要 `role.manage` 权限
   - 幂等操作：如果角色未分配给用户，不返回错误
   - 如果用户不存在返回 404

```python
        visited.add(current)
        parent = Role.query.get(current)
        if parent is None:
            break
        current = parent.parent_role_id
    return False
```

content.content:
1	# T2-3：RBAC 权限管理系统（多模块版本）
2	
3	## 项目结构
4	
5	```
6	starter/
7	  app.py              # Flask app 工厂 + DB 初始化（请勿修改）
8	  models.py           # 数据模型（Tenant, User, Role, Permission, Document + 关联表）
9	  middleware.py       # JWT 验证 + 权限检查（含继承遍历）
10	  routes_auth.py      # 登录接口 —— 需要完善
11	  routes_document.py  # 文档 CRUD + RBAC —— 需要实现
12	  routes_role.py      # 角色管理 + 用户角色分配 —— 需要实现
13	  requirements.txt    # 依赖
14	```
15	
16	## 重要提示
17	
18	这是一个**多模块项目**，代码分布在 6 个文件中。模块间有复杂依赖：
19	- `middleware.py` 需要从 `models.py` 导入 Role/Permission 进行继承遍历
20	- `routes_document.py` 需要使用 `middleware.py` 的权限检查
21	- `routes_role.py` 需要检查 `middleware.py` 的 role.manage 权限
22	- 所有路由需要从 `models.py` 导入对应模型
23	- `app.py` 负责组装所有模块（请勿修改）
24	
25	**请确保各模块之间的接口（权限码字符串、模型字段名、JWT payload 结构）保持一致。**
26	
27	## 功能要求
28	
29	### 1. 数据模型（models.py）
30	- Tenant: id, name
31	- User: id, tenant_id (FK), username (unique), password_hash, created_at
32	- Role: id, tenant_id (FK), name, parent_role_id (self-ref FK, nullable)
33	- Permission: id, code (e.g. `doc.read`, `doc.write`, `doc.delete`, `doc.write.any`, `role.manage`)
34	- role_permissions: 多对多关联表
35	- user_roles: 多对多关联表
36	- Document: id, tenant_id (FK), owner_id (FK), title, content
37	
38	### 2. 认证中间件（middleware.py）
39	- JWT 验证：从 `Authorization: Bearer <token>` 解析
40	- 缺失/无效/过期 token → 401
41	- 权限检查：沿 `parent_role_id` 继承链向上查找
42	- 提供装饰器和辅助函数
43	
44	### 3. 认证接口（routes_auth.py）
45	使用 `auth_bp = Blueprint('auth_bp', __name__)`
46	- `POST /login` — 登录，返回 JWT（含 user_id + tenant_id）
47	
48	### 4. 文档接口（routes_document.py）
49	使用 `document_bp = Blueprint('document_bp', __name__)`
50	- `GET /documents` — 需要 `doc.read`，只返回本 tenant
51	- `GET /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.read` + 同 tenant（否则 404）
52	- `POST /documents` — 需要 `doc.write`
53	- `PUT /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.write` +（owner 或 `doc.write.any`）
54	- `DELETE /documents/<id>` — 需要 `doc.delete`
55	
56	### 5. 角色管理接口（routes_role.py）
57	使用 `role_bp = Blueprint('role_bp', __name__)`
58	- `POST /roles` — 创建角色（需要 `role.manage`）
59	- `GET /roles` — 列出本 tenant 的角色
60	- `PUT /roles/<id>/permissions` — 替换权限集 + 更新 parent
61	- `POST /users/<id>/roles` — 分配角色
62	- `DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id>` — 移除角色
63	- 创建/修改时检测继承链循环
64	
65	### 接口返回格式
66	
67	```json
68	{"status": "ok", "data": ...}
69	{"status": "error", "message": "错误描述"}
70	```
71	
72	## 验收标准
73	
74	1. ✅ 所有上述 API 接口可正常调用
75	2. ✅ `tests/test_basic.py` 中的所有测试用例通过
76	
77	## 测试
78	
79	```bash
80	cd starter && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd .. && python -m pytest tests/ -v
81	```
82

1	"""
2	T2 RBAC System — Role Management Routes
3	
4	Role CRUD, user-role assignment, permission management.
5	Register as a Flask Blueprint named 'role_bp'.
6	All operations require role.manage permission.
7	
8	Requirements:
9	- POST /roles -> Create role
10	  Requires: role.manage
11	  Request: {"name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null, "permissions": [str, ...]}
12	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": {"id": int, "name": str, "parent_role_id": int|null,
13	            "permissions": [str, ...]}}
14	  - Must check for duplicate role names within same tenant
15	  - parent_role_id must belong to same tenant
16	  Errors: 400 if name missing or parent invalid, 409 if duplicate name
17	
18	- GET /roles -> List roles for current tenant
19	  Requires: role.manage
20	  Response: {"status": "ok", "data": [...]}
21	
22	- PUT /roles/<id>/permissions -> Update role permissions and/or parent
23	  Requires: role.manage
24	  Request: {"permissions": [str, ...], "parent_role_id": int|null}
25	  - Must detect inheritance cycles when setting parent_role_id
26	  Errors: 404 if role not found, 400 if cycle detected or parent invalid
27	
28	- POST /users/<id>/roles -> Assign role to user
29	  Requires: role.manage
30	  Request: {"role_id": int}
31	  - Both user and role must belong to same tenant
32	  Errors: 404 if user or role not found
33	
34	- DELETE /users/<id>/roles/<role_id> -> Remove role from user
35	  Requires: role.manage
36	  - Idempotent — no error if role not assigned
37	  Errors: 404 if user not found
38	
39	IMPORTANT: Role inheritance is handled by middleware._collect_role_permissions().
40	Roles are tenant-scoped. This module works with middleware.py and routes_document.py.
41	"""
42	
43	from flask import Blueprint, request, jsonify
44	
45	role_bp = Blueprint('role_bp', __name__)
46
